excerpt: The official programme page for MSc in Mathematics lists Priority round opening on 2025-09-01 and closing on 2026-01-31. Source: https://www.gs.cuhk.edu.hk/admissions/application-deadline Priority round: 31 January 2026 Final round: 31 March 2026 (Applications will be processed on a rolling basis until all places have been filled. Therefore, early applications are strongly encouraged.)
